title: VALID_ROLES const + defence-in-depth double-validation is correct and should not be simplified
description: VALID_ROLES as a single const referenced by both validate_member_patch and apply_member_patch is the right pattern. A contributor might suggest inlining the role list in one place or removing the re-validation in apply_member_patch as redundant. The re-check exists as defence-in-depth: if a future caller of apply_member_patch skips the validate step, invalid roles will still be caught before hitting the store. Removing it would leave the store's role validation solely as a doc comment (see upsert_space_member_with_role precondition). The redundancy is intentional and should be kept.
close_reason: Decision recorded; no code change needed
